channel.title: Posts - Terry Chen
channel.description: Hi, this is Terry. I'm documenting my product ideas and learning notes in this blog. I'm interested in creating new user experiences through generative ai, focusing on synthesized content generation and actionable insight extraction.

image.title: Terry Chen
image.description: Hi, this is Terry. I'm documenting my product ideas and learning notes in this blog. I'm interested in creating new user experiences through generative ai, focusing on synthesized content generation and actionable insight extraction.

item.title: Agentic Engineering: How One Developer Ships Like a Team
item.author: Terry Chen (Terry Chen)
item.description: I spent a day researching how Peter Steinberger ships hundreds of commits a day alone. What I found forced me to confront something uncomfortable: I've been using AI agents wrong the whole time.
item.dc:creator: Terry Chen

item.title: Running a 1-Person Billion Dollar Company: The AI Stack That Makes It Possible
item.author: Terry Chen (Terry Chen)
item.description: The complete toolkit for building a billion-dollar company with a team of one. How AI agents handle research, coding, operations, and marketing while you focus on vision.
item.dc:creator: Terry Chen

item.title: The Real-Time Feedback Layer: How Crowdlisten Closes the Loop Between Builders and Audiences
item.author: Terry Chen (Terry Chen)
item.description: Products are conversations, not launches. Crowdlisten is evolving from insight extraction into a real-time feedback layer that connects what builders ship with how audiences actually respond, creating continuous learning loops that compound over time and inform PRD decisions.
item.dc:creator: Terry Chen

item.title: The Closing Window Frame of AI Applications
item.author: Terry Chen (Terry Chen)
item.description: Reflections on timing, momentum, and the urgency of positioning in the rapidly evolving AI landscape. From early optimism to the reality of commercialization challenges.
item.dc:creator: Terry Chen

item.title: Google NotebookLM - Long Context Windows and Multimodality
item.author: Terry Chen (Terry Chen)
item.description: Exploring Google NotebookLM's approach to long context windows and multimodal AI interactions for research and knowledge management.
item.dc:creator: Terry Chen

item.title: The Monetization Paradox of AI
item.author: Terry Chen (Terry Chen)
item.description: Despite heavy investment in AI, a core challenge remains: turning its outsized promise into tangible, monetizable value for users.
item.dc:creator: Terry Chen

item.title: Weighing Social Interactions: Reconstructing Meaning from Large Multi-modal Datasets
item.author: Terry Chen (Terry Chen)
item.description: Technical analysis of AI-powered search systems and topic modeling approaches, exploring semantic retrieval, embedding spaces, and the challenges of modern web crawling.
item.dc:creator: Terry Chen

item.title: Learnings from Every on Building an AI-Native Startup
item.author: Terry Chen (Terry Chen)
item.description: How Every built a million-dollar AI business with just 15 people by embracing AI-first operations. Their engineers write virtually zero code while publishing daily newsletters, shipping products, and running consulting—the most radical example of AI-native operations.
item.dc:creator: Terry Chen

item.title: Preparing for Associate Product Manager Interviews: A Comprehensive Guide
item.author: Terry Chen (Terry Chen)
item.description: Everything you need to know to ace your APM interviews at top tech companies. Covers behavioral questions, product sense, technical skills, and strategic thinking frameworks.
item.dc:creator: Terry Chen

item.title: The Best Practices Lie: On Dealing with Ambiguity
item.author: Terry Chen (Terry Chen)
item.description: The methodologies that get you into elite institutions—optimized for speed and pattern recognition—become liabilities when facing the genuine ambiguity of startups and real-world problems.
item.dc:creator: Terry Chen

item.title: Social Listening for Product Insight
item.author: Terry Chen (Terry Chen)
item.description: Using AI-powered social listening to extract authentic customer insights from online discourse. Moving from product-to-market to market-to-product development through systematic analysis of community discussions that inform PRDs.
item.dc:creator: Terry Chen

item.title: When to Sunset a Product: A Decision Framework for Entrepreneurs
item.author: Terry Chen (Terry Chen)
item.description: A framework for deciding when to sunset products and projects. Understanding opportunity costs, sunk cost fallacy, and making difficult decisions about failing ventures. Essential guidance for startup founders and product managers.
item.dc:creator: Terry Chen

item.title: Using LLMs as a Cover up for Poor Thinking
item.author: Terry Chen (Terry Chen)
item.description: How the ease of LLM-generated content masks poor reasoning and why developing domain expertise remains crucial for meaningful innovation beyond automated productivity gains.
item.dc:creator: Terry Chen

item.title: Questions as the New Bottleneck in Learning
item.author: Terry Chen (Terry Chen)
item.description: In an age of infinite information, asking the right questions has become more valuable than finding answers. Exploring how question formulation is transforming education and knowledge acquisition in the AI era.
item.dc:creator: Terry Chen

item.title: Why People Care What Others Think
item.author: Terry Chen (Terry Chen)
item.description: Understanding collective intelligence and social dynamics. Why crowd psychology matters for product builders and how human need for belonging drives engagement patterns.
item.dc:creator: Terry Chen

item.title: Content Platforms Will Become Distribution-by-Generation Systems
item.author: Terry Chen (Terry Chen)
item.description: As generation costs collapse, distribution shifts from routing static content to generating the right content instance for each context. This post argues that future content platforms will distribute by generation, not retrieval.
item.dc:creator: Terry Chen

item.title: Product Engineers and AI Multipliers
item.author: Terry Chen' (Terry Chen')
item.description: How AI is transforming product engineering teams into smaller, more efficient units. Learn why product engineers are becoming more valuable than traditional product managers in AI-first organizations.
item.dc:creator: Terry Chen'

item.title: Interesting Reads
item.author: Terry Chen (Terry Chen)
item.description: Curated collection of compelling articles and insights on AI agents, entrepreneurship, and product development. Features analysis of breakthrough AI tools and emerging trends.
item.dc:creator: Terry Chen

item.title: The Craft of Miyazaki in an AI-Generated World
item.author: Terry Chen (Terry Chen)
item.description: Explore Hayao Miyazaki's meticulous animation process and its significance in today's AI-generated creative landscape. Learn about the value of craft in a world of automated content.
item.dc:creator: Terry Chen

item.title: User Needs & Opportunities
item.author: Terry Chen (Terry Chen)
item.description: Identifying real user pain points and business opportunities through conversations and online research. A collection of validated user needs that could become viable startups.
item.dc:creator: Terry Chen

item.title: The First Stage: A Reflection
item.author: Terry Chen (Terry Chen)
item.description: Reflecting on 2024: lessons from founding Cogno, the importance of hands-on product development, choosing college over dropping out, and key insights for first-time founders building AI products.
item.dc:creator: Terry Chen

item.title: How to Work on What You Love: Career Advice from Top Entrepreneurs
item.author: Patrick Collison, Paul Graham, Sam Altman, etc (Patrick Collison, Paul Graham, Sam Altman, etc)
item.description: Curated advice from successful entrepreneurs and thinkers on finding passion, going deep on interests, and building a meaningful career doing what you love. Insights from Patrick Collison, Paul Graham, and other successful founders.
item.dc:creator: Patrick Collison, Paul Graham, Sam Altman, etc

item.title: Essence of Creativity: Future of Creative Work
item.author: Terry Chen (Terry Chen)
item.description: Exploring the intersection of AI-generated content and human creativity. Analysis of creative workflows, multimodal interactions, and the future of content creation in the AI era.
item.dc:creator: Terry Chen
